sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34544" key="e)mpueli/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμπῠελ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πύελος</etym>) <sense id="n34544.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">socket</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing</tr_> to receive a <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κνώδαξ</foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0559.tlg002:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
